prompt:
Realistic banner-style glamour fashion portrait with a grainy analog film aesthetic. Dim interior with a retro, slightly industrial design. An adult female, over 21 years old, sitting low on the floor near a large white appliance or vending machine-like object on the left side of the frame. High-angle downward shot with an intimate snapshot perspective. The subject is distributed diagonally in the lower right half of the frame, facing the camera with a direct gaze and a soft, dignified expression.

Character: Long straight dark brown hair, side bangs, glossy finish falling over one shoulder. Exquisite makeup: thick eyeliner, long lashes, soft blush, smooth glowing skin, understated coral pink lip color. Bright yellow string bikini with thin straps and side ties. Black high heels. Dignified, fashion photography feel—focusing on color contrast, posture, lighting, fabric texture, and retro atmosphere, rather than nudity.

Posture: Low and dynamic, kneeling near the floor, one hand lightly touching the ground, the other near the thigh. A small brown cushion or mat is visible under some poses. Left foreground: A large light-colored vertical surface (wall or partition) partially obscuring the view and adding depth. Behind her: White appliance or cabinet with small shelves and items. The floor is an understated grey-green with fine texture.

Lighting and Tone: Moody artificial lighting—a blend of cool grey-green shadows and soft magenta-purple highlights near the floor, warm skin tones. Direct but diffused indoor light with soft shimmering highlights on the face and body, and soft shadows beneath the subject. Slight film grain, slight blurring at the edges, low-key contrast, nostalgic low-light magazine photo feel. Tones: Vibrant yellow swimwear, black high heels, warm skin tones, dark brown hair, white appliance, grey-green floor, beige foreground wall, soft magenta-purple reflections, low-key shadow background.

Style: Realistic analog glamour photography, high-angle composition, indoor retro scene, cinematic grain, shallow depth of field, banner composition. No text, no watermark, no logo, no cartoonish feel, no deformed bodies, no extra people, no cluttered elements, no explicit nudity.
